dispositions.label: Report taken
dispositions.definition: Written or electronic report completed; incident documented for records.

dispositions.label: Gone on arrival
dispositions.definition: Subject or problem gone before unit arrival; no contact.

dispositions.label: Unable to locate
dispositions.definition: Units unable to locate address, subject, or event after reasonable search.

dispositions.label: Advised
dispositions.definition: Parties advised; no report or arrest; civil or informational outcome.

dispositions.label: Arrest
dispositions.definition: One or more subjects arrested; booking path outside Phase 0 depth.

dispositions.label: Unfounded
dispositions.definition: Investigation determined no offense or event as reported.

dispositions.label: Cancelled
dispositions.definition: Cancelled prior to or after dispatch by complainant, supervisor, or false alarm determination.

dispositions.label: Duplicate
dispositions.definition: Duplicate of another CFS; link required in narrative or linkedIncidentId.

dispositions.label: Referred other agency
dispositions.definition: Referred to another agency or jurisdiction (including port handoff fiction).
